title: ABU DHABI AIRPORTS
content: With an 18th consecutive quarter of double-digit passenger traffic growth, Zayed International Airport (AUH) is the airport of the future. More than 30 million passengers annually get from gate-curb in approximately 12 minutes, thanks to a facility that houses multi-biometric touchpoints and one of the region’s largest environmental art pieces. Meanwhile, world-class retail and dining ensure they are enthralled, enriched and rejuvenated, all part of a wellbeing focus that sees AUH simultaneously holding honours as UNESCO Prix Versailles’ World’s Most Beautiful Airport in 2024 and the 2025 Frontier Award for Best Airport for Retail.

title: ABU DHABI CALENDAR
content: Abu Dhabi Calendar delivers a year-round lineup of world-class experiences, from iconic festivals and concerts to major sports, art, and family events. The 2025 season kicked off with Coldplay’s sold-out concerts in January and continued with Abu Dhabi Comedy Season, followed by NBA and UFC events in October. Still to come are the MICHELIN Guide Food Festival, Abu Dhabi Art Fair, the Formula 1 Abu Dhabi Grand Prix, Mother of the Nation, Liwa Festival, New Year’s Eve with John Legend, Saadiyat Nights concerts and more! Stay tuned for 2026 — an even bigger season of unmissable moments is on the way.

title: AL AIN & AL DHAFRA REGIONS
content:
In the heart of the UAE, Abu Dhabi’s Al Ain Region offers a journey through time, where heritage meets nature.
Under the Department of Culture and Tourism – Abu Dhabi, Experience Al Ain showcases UNESCO-listed oases, majestic forts, museums, and vibrant local culture.
Visitors are invited to discover authentic Emirati traditions, adventure, and warm hospitality within the UAE’s cultural heartland.

Al Dhafra is a place of tranquillity, space, and authenticity, boasting some of the world’s largest sand dunes, rare wildlife, a vast coastline and fascinating historical monuments. A destination full of potential, Al Dhafra invites travellers of all interests and budgets.

title: BAB AL QASR HOTEL & RESIDENCES
content:
The Bab Al Qasr Hotel & Residences in Abu Dhabi offers a lavish 5-star accommodation, fusing Middle Eastern allure with authentic Arabian warmth. The private beach venue caters to both business and leisure guests seeking luxurious accommodations.
• 5 Star Luxury
• Authentic Arabian Experience
• Elite Area of Abu Dhabi, Near Presidential Palace
• 677 Rooms - rooms, suites & apartments
• Banquet and Meeting Rooms
• 2 Upscale Restaurants and 2 Stylish Bars
• Luxury Spa and Health Club
• Magnificent Ballroom and 8 Meeting Rooms
• Stunning Swimming Pool on the Lobby Level
• Private Beach

title: BEDOUIN TRIPS TOURISM LLC
content: Bedouin Trips Tourism LLC is your trusted partner for discovering the UAE - where heritage meets innovation. From luxury shopping and iconic architecture to thrilling adventures, we ensure a seamless travel experience. Founded by experts with 15+ years in hospitality and destination management, we’re known for exceptional service. Our experienced team crafts bespoke journeys tailored to your needs, making us a preferred name in UAE tourism.

title: CONRAD ABU DHABI ETIHAD TOWERS
content: Conrad Abu Dhabi Etihad Towers is a luxury urban resort and culinary destination, home to over 12 world-class dining venues, a luxurious spa with 13 treatment rooms, a private beach, three swimming pools, and the Observation Deck at 300, offering breathtaking 360-degree views of the city from the 74th floor. Stay inspired in its 576 elegant rooms, suites, and residences, all with spectacular views of the Arabian Gulf. The resort is just minutes from the Presidential Palace, setting the standard for luxury hospitality and extraordinary experiences.

title: DCT ABU DHABI (EUROPE OFFICES)
content: Discover Abu Dhabi, the capital of the United Arab Emirates, where rich cultural heritage meets cutting-edge innovation. An unparalleled destination offering spans iconic landmarks, stunning natural landscapes, award-winning attractions, exciting gastronomy, and world-class entertainment and business events. In a place where vibrant culture meets economic opportunity, we connect global partners with the region’s dynamic growth story. Partner with us and unlock unrivalled access, immersive experiences and meaningful collaborations in a thriving gateway to the Middle East and beyond.

title: DESERT GATE TOURISM
content: Desert Gate Tourism began as a visionary dream in 2004, founded on professionalism, deep industry expertise, and a passion for creating unforgettable guest experiences. From a ground-handling service for tour operators, we have grown into a premier Destination Management Company across six destinations: UAE, Oman, Qatar, Maldives, Mauritius, and Sri Lanka. Our portfolio features bespoke hotel bookings, elevated transfers, curated excursions, MICE services, and sports experiences. At Desert Gate Tourism, we deliver experiences that go beyond the ordinary, connect people, and transform journeys.

title: ERTH ABU DHABI
content: ERTH Abu Dhabi is a landmark hospitality destination combining Emirati heritage with modern luxury. Formerly the Armed Forces Officers Club & Hotel, ERTH offers 237 rooms, suites, and villas, extensive leisure facilities, world-class dining, and one of the largest meeting and event venues in the UAE. Conveniently located near Abu Dhabi landmarks, we deliver authentic Emirati experiences with exceptional service for leisure travelers, families, and groups from around the world.

title: ETHARA
content: Ethara is shaping the future of entertainment, sport, culture, event services, and asset management regionally and internationally. Headquartered on Abu Dhabi’s Yas Island, and with offices in Dubai and Riyadh, the company employs over 300 professionals who offer an unrivalled wealth of expertise, experience, knowledge and skills. Ethara, meaning ‘thrill’ in Arabic, operates an impressive portfolio of assets, including Yas Marina Circuit, Etihad Park, Etihad Arena and the Yas Conference Centre. The company works with leading events companies, IP owners, and entertainment partners locally and internationally to deliver world-class, first-to-market events and experiences. For further information, visit: www.ethara.com

title: ETIHAD AIRWAYS
content: Etihad Airways, the national airline of the UAE, was formed in 2003 and quickly went on to become one of the world’s leading airlines. From its home in Abu Dhabi, Etihad flies to passenger and cargo destinations in the Middle East, Africa, Europe, Asia, Australia, and North America. Together with Etihad’s codeshare partners, Etihad’s network offers access to hundreds of international destinations. In recent years, Etihad has received numerous awards for its superior service and products, cargo offering, loyalty programme and more. To learn more, visit etihad.com

title: EXPERIENCE ABU DHABI
content: Discover Abu Dhabi, the capital of the United Arab Emirates, where rich cultural heritage meets cutting-edge innovation. An unparalleled destination offering spans iconic landmarks, stunning natural landscapes, award-winning attractions, exciting gastronomy, and world-class entertainment and business events. In a place where vibrant culture meets economic opportunity, we connect global partners with the region’s dynamic growth story. Partner with us and unlock unrivalled access, immersive experiences and meaningful collaborations in a thriving gateway to the Middle East and beyond.

title: FAIRMONT BAB AL BAHR
content: Fairmont Bab Al Bahr, Abu Dhabi offers 366 spacious rooms and suites with stunning views of Abu Dhabi Creek and the Sheikh Zayed Grand Mosque. Guests enjoy exclusive Fairmont Gold privileges, eight award-winning restaurants, a private beach, Olympic-sized pool, and state-of-the-art fitness facilities. With over 2,500 sqm of event space, including a grand ballroom and outdoor venues, the hotel is ideal for both business and leisure stays.

title:
FEDERAL AUTHORITY FOR IDENTITY,
CITIZENSHIP, CUSTOMS & PORT SECURITY
content: Federal Authority for Identity, Citizenship, Customs & Port Security (ICP) was established on Sha’ban 15, 1425H corresponding to September 29, 2004 under the name “Emirates Identity Authority” under Federal Law No. (2) for the year 2004 to establish the “Population Register and Emirates Identity Card Program”, which included recording personal and vital data for all population in the state and keeping them in electronic databases in coordination with the competent authorities, and issuing the Emirates ID Card for each individual to be registered and to contain the Emirates ID number, readable data and data stored on an electronic chip, which can be used in all entities.

title: GRAND HYATT ABU DHABI
content: Grand Hyatt Abu Dhabi Hotel & Residences Emirates Pearl is a luxury hotel of extraordinary architecture, standing tall in the prestigious West Corniche district. The 5-star hotel in Abu Dhabi is conveniently accessible to the city’s business hub, high-end shopping districts, and is a short 35-minute drive from Abu Dhabi International Airport and the Louvre Abu Dhabi.

title: GULF CIRCLE TOURS LLC
content:
In the many years since GCT opened its doors in 2001, two specific values have always been at the forefront of all that we do; they form the essence of what we believe is a solid foundation and long-term strategy for mutual success.
The absolute first of those is that we strongly believe in the importance of a partnership with our clients and that we are dedicated to the same goals and working hand-in-hand to achieve memorable experiences and repeat customers. The second, and equally as important, is that we recognize that every client is different and a good understanding from our side will ensure that the itineraries we develop together are specific and unique to the needs of each clientele.”

title: HILTON ABU DHABI YAS ISLAND
content: Exceptional events happen here. Our sophisticated venues are ideal for exhibitions, big events, congresses, car launches, signature events, executive board meetings, and intimate occasions. Offering 2,946 sqm of flexible event space, including multiple ballrooms, multi-purpose meeting rooms, executive boardrooms, an outdoor courtyard, expansive terrace, 900 sqm of foyer space, and an events lounge on one level with a dedicated entrance and reception. Prime waterfront location on Yas Bay, 100m from Etihad Arena, near the world's largest indoor theme park.

title: JANNAH HOTELS & RESORTS
content: Jannah Hotels & Resorts is a distinguished hospitality brand inspired by the noble traditions of Bedouin hospitality, providing personalized service across its premium properties in the UAE. Combining modern sophistication with timeless charm, Jannah is dedicated to delivering exceptional guest experiences. With a strong commitment to sustainability and excellence, the brand offers luxurious accommodations, innovative services, and eco-friendly practices in Abu Dhabi, Dubai, and Ras Al Khaimah.

title: LE ROYAL MÉRIDIEN ABU DHABI
content: Discover the avant-garde exterior of Le Royal Méridien Abu Dhabi, unveiling 278 chic aesthetic guestrooms, an exclusive Le Royal Club Lounge, and elevated amenities; savour award-winning dining at its legendary Irish Pub and the only revolving restaurant in Abu Dhabi, whilst exploring creative meeting spaces with natural daylight. Le Royal Méridien Abu Dhabi seamlessly intertwines European elegance with the thrill of discovery, ensuring an unforgettable experience.Discover the avant-garde exterior of Le Royal Méridien Abu Dhabi, unveiling 278 chic aesthetic guestrooms, an exclusive Le Royal Club Lounge, and elevated amenities; savour award-winning dining at its legendary Irish Pub and the only revolving restaurant in Abu Dhabi, whilst exploring creative meeting spaces with natural daylight. Le Royal Méridien Abu Dhabi seamlessly intertwines European elegance with the thrill of discovery, ensuring an unforgettable experience.

title: MAGIC TRAVELS
content: Magic Travels DMC, established in 1985, is an award-winning luxury destination management company creating tailor-made holidays, private tours, and incentive programs. With a portfolio spanning the Middle East, Europe, and the Caucasus, we offer bespoke journeys, eco-luxury camps, Nile cruises, and curated experiences through brands including Magic Arabia, Magic Roads, GAIA, VIVI, and SPICE DMC, ensuring unforgettable travel for discerning clients worldwide.

title: MARRIOTT HOTEL AL FORSAN
content: Marriott Hotel Al Forsan Abu Dhabi offers a unique ‘destination within a destination’ experience. Guests enjoy modern and spacious accommodations, versatile dining, wellness and leisure facilities, adventure activities, and the second biggest pool in Abu Dhabi – all within an exclusive, Green Key certified setting. We combine relaxation, recreation, and personalized service for memorable stays. Whatever your occasion, Marriott Al Forsan is the place to be.

title:
MASARRA DESTINATION
MANAGEMENT COMPANY
content: Masarra is a full-service Destination Management Company focused on curating a unique portfolio of experiences in Abu Dhabi and the UAE. With a team of destination experts passionate about the region’s offerings, we specialise in creating tailored destinaation experiences, MICE offerings, and golf and adventure activities that leave lasting impressions.

title: MEDICAL TOURISM
content:
Visit our booth to explore Abu Dhabi’s top-tier healthcare institutions - Cleveland Clinic Abu Dhabi (CCAD), Burjeel Hospital, and Sheikh Shakhbout Medical City (SSMC).

Each day highlights one hospital, offering visitors a unique opportunity to learn about their advanced medical tourism services, specialized treatments, and global patient care programs.
Engage with representatives to discuss potential collaborations and discover how these hospitals are transforming healthcare excellence.

title: NIRVANA OVER THE WORLD LLC
content:
Nirvana Over the World brings together the two ends of the spectrum – the suppliers and the buyers – under a common umbrella. Established and aided by Nirvana’s technologically advanced platform, N.O.W makes it possible to host a plethora of travel services under one roof, adeptly utilizing its raft of technological skills, a widespread network of travel providers, and a strong base of on-ground services. 
As an award-winning entity, N.O.W. ensures that our clients receive reliable and unparalleled consistent service. Ultimately, we are committed to offering the best in value and premium travel arrangements. N.O.W. is committed to excellence and providing the highest standards of hospitality.

title: OVERSEAS TRAVEL
content: Overseas Travel LLC, based in Abu Dhabi, offers a comprehensive range of destination management services for travelers visiting the UAE and Oman. Renowned for its personalized service, regional expertise, and commitment to excellence, the company has become a trusted partner for inbound travel across the GCC—delivering seamless experiences, exceptional value, and authentic Arabian hospitality.

title: PARK HYATT ABU DHABI HOTEL AND VILLAS
content: Park Hyatt Abu Dhabi Hotel and Villas is a luxurious haven on Saadiyat Island, blending elegance, modernity, and Arabian hospitality. Featuring 306 spacious guest rooms, suites, and villas, plus 1,220 square meters of event space, the hotel offers critically acclaimed restaurants, exceptional amenities, and breathtaking Arabian Gulf views for an unforgettable Abu Dhabi experience.

title: PASSAGE TO ARABIA BY AL TAYER TRAVEL
content:
Passage to Arabia has been distinguished in the region for its innovative and cutting-edge business strategies, which sets us apart from the rest.
1979 was the year Passage to Arabia the division of Al Tayer Travel Agency L.L.C. opened its doors to provide travel related services for an emerging Dubai. And as the needs of our clients grew, so we did to expand to a business providing Hotel reservations , Tours & Excursions, Holiday packages, M.I.C.E, Airline tickets, Chauffeured car hire, etc.

title: QASR AL WATAN
content: Qasr Al Watan is a working Presidential palace in Abu Dhabi and a majestic cultural landmark that invites you to discover the rich legacy of knowledge and tradition that has shaped the UAE's journey. More than just a traditional palace, Qasr Al Watan boosts cultural understanding of the nation and emphasizes its incredible history. The palace stands as an icon of Abu Dhabi's skyline with a design exquisitely crafted to tribute to its Arabian heritage and artistry. You will feel the grandeur as you enter the grounds, and the structure and open halls echo its significance in Emirati culture

title: REEM MALL
content: Reem Mall is the ultimate USD $1.3 billion shopping, dining, lifestyle and entertainment destination in Abu Dhabi. Home to Snow Abu Dhabi – the region’s largest snow park, the 186,000 sqm mall features over 400 stores including 80 F&B concepts, unmatched entertainment, the capital’s largest selection of home stores, and unique retail concepts, such as the world’s first and only Bloomingdale’s Beauty. Reem Mall’s convenient location, exceptional facilities and unparalleled shopping experience make it the perfect family destination for residents and tourists visiting Abu Dhabi.

title: RIXOS MARINA ABU DHABI
content: Rixos Marina Abu Dhabi is an iconic landmark, blending the best of Arabic and Turkish culture, dining, and hospitality. The resort’s sophisticated design, drawing inspiration from aquatic and Arabesque influences, tells the story of Abu Dhabi. Rixos Marina Abu Dhabi dares to elevate the guest experience, offering world-class gastronomy and entertainment. The hotel’s unique Multi-Board Experience caters to all travelers, allowing the freedom to explore endless possibilities through various cuisines, vibrant entertainment, and thrilling activities, designed to enrich every moment.

title: RIXOS PREMIUM SAADIYAT ISLAND
content: Escape to Rixos Premium Saadiyat Island, a luxurious all-inclusive retreat in Abu Dhabi. Nestled on pristine Saadiyat Island, the resort offers crystal-clear Arabian Sea views, exceptional service, and world-class amenities. Guests enjoy a rich culinary journey across acclaimed restaurants and unwind with refreshing drinks at elegant bars and lounges—poolside, beachside, or indoors. It's the perfect blend of relaxation, indulgence, and natural beauty.

title: RIYA TRAVEL & TOURISM LLC
content: The Riya Group is a leading travel company that predominantly serves the requirements of travellers across the USA, Canada, UAE, Saudi Arabia, India, Thailand and Philippines. Offering 15+ travel solutions, the Riya Group is an established brand in the travel industry with 45+ years' experience. Today, Riya Group has a turnover of nearly USD 2 billion, 9 business verticals and serves 200,000+ travel partners. With an extensive suite of services, we cater to travel partners, students, corporates, and shipping companies and we continue to be the leading travel service provider in the world.

title: ROCKET DMC INTERNATIONAL
content: Rocket DMC International is a global Destination Management Company specializing in tailor-made travel across Turkey, Egypt, UAE, Spain, Morocco, Tunisia, Uzbekistan, Cuba, Montenegro, and Croatia. We deliver authentic, seamless experiences through expert local teams and strong partnerships. Our services include FIT & Group Travel, MICE, Concierge, and Ground Handling - combining innovation, precision, and passion to create journeys that inspire and endure.

title: ROTANA HOTELS
content: Rotana manages a portfolio of over 118 operational and pipeline properties across the Middle East, Africa, Eastern Europe, and Türkiye, with an aggressive expansion plan. Rotana has chosen to acknowledge how precious time is by making all time spent in their hotels ‘Treasured Time.’ This means Rotana has pledged to understand and meet the individual needs of all guests. In so doing, Rotana has evolved its product brands to include Rotana Hotels & Resorts, Centro Hotels by Rotana, Rayhaan Hotels & Resorts by Rotana, Arjaan Hotel Apartments by Rotana, Edge by Rotana, and The Residences by Rotana.

title: SAADIYAT CULTURAL DISTRICT
content: Saadiyat Cultural District Abu Dhabi is a unique constellation of museums, cultural institutions, collections and public programming that celebrate the achievements of the United Arab Emirates, the region and the world. Saadiyat Cultural District is a centre for innovation and creativity, research and knowledge and a place to encounter. Offering one of the highest concentrations of cultural experiences, Saadiyat Cultural District is home to Louvre Abu Dhabi, and the future home of Zayed National Museum, Guggenheim Abu Dhabi, Natural History Museum Abu Dhabi, and teamLab Phenomena Abu Dhabi.

title: SURPRISE TOURISM
content:
Surprise Tourism LLC is a premier Destination Management Company (DMC) based in UAE, specializing in inbound and outbound travel across worldwide destinations. As one of the top 5 tour operators in the UAE, we are committed to delivering exceptional travel experiences that blend luxury, adventure, and cultural immersion.

With a deep understanding of global destinations and strong industry partnerships, we offer tailor-made travel solutions for individual travelers, groups, and corporate clients. Whether it’s exploring iconic landmarks, indulging in luxury getaways, or experiencing rich cultural heritage, our expert team ensures seamless and unforgettable journeys.

title: TEAMLAB PHENOMENA ABU DHABI
content:
A home for infinite curiosity to escape reality and discover a realm where art and science combine to push the limits of imagination-a place where nothing can exist, except in relation to everything else.

Get ready to experience teamLab Phenomena Saadiyat Island, Abu Dhabi, a mind-blowing expedition into ourselves and our environment, designed to expand consciousness and offer a new perspective on the world around us.

The museum will take visitors on an experiential journey through immersive art installations that emerge and evolve freely as if they were life forms themselves. The experience will be unique to each visitor, changing with each visit, to inspire self-discovery and ignite curiosity, imagination, and creativity

title: THE ABU DHABI EDITION
content: The ABU DHABI EDITION brings the only luxury lifestyle hotel to the region. A contemporary and trend-setting hotel, with a unique hospitality concept. The ABU DHABI EDITION will be host to spectacular and eye-catching designs in the heart of Abu Dhabi. Locally groundbreaking dining and bar concepts, state-of-the-art meeting venues, and recreational facilities to keep all guests pampered or occupied in beautiful yet fuss-free surroundings. Guest engagement is seamless and interactive through a passionate service philosophy. The experience will carry through our sophisticated yet stimulating designs which will create an overall magical and lasting experience

title: THE ABU DHABI PASS
content:
Alike (www.alike.io) is a D2C social travel marketplace that aims to establish a new way of sharing, discovering, planning, and booking travel experiences conveniently all-in-one place.

Alike helps travellers discover and get inspired with unique travel experiences shared by the travel content creators, plan their trip using Alike’s seamless trip planner and book those experiences on the same platform, without any need to grind across multiple websites. Helping them enjoy travel like the people they like!

Alike excitedly looks forward to continuing to disrupt the travel industry status quo.

title: TOURISM365
content: Tourism365, the tourism arm of ADNEC Group, leads Abu Dhabi’s tourism industry by creating unforgettable travel experiences. With a vision to be a top travel organization in the MENA region, we connect travelers with unique destinations. Operating as a Destination Management Company (DMC) in the UAE, Saudi Arabia, Oman, and Jordan, we also offer corporate travel solutions through our Travel Management Company (TMC). Our tour operator brands, Capital Holidays and Etihad Holidays, serve clients in the UAE, UK, and Germany, catering to a wide range of travel needs, from budget to luxury.

title: TRAVCO LLC
content:
With over 25 years of experience TRAVCO has evolved as one of the leading DMC’s in the Gulf with operations in UAE, Oman & Qatar.

TRAVCO offers a wide range of in destination services with dedicated staff specializing in developing bespoke programs and itineraries to suit client’s requirements from individual travelers, leisure groups to large MICE business.

title: W ABU DHABI
content: Experience the thrill of W Abu Dhabi - Yas Island, the only hotel perched atop a legendary racetrack. Choose from 499 stylish rooms boasting stunning track and marina views. Indulge in world-class dining at Garage, Brooklyn Chop House, or Pappas Taverna, and unwind with crafted cocktails at W Lounge. Dive into fun at WET Deck and Sun Deck, energize at FIT gym, and rejuvenate at AWAY Spa. Just minutes from Yas Island’s exciting theme parks, this pet-friendly paradise promises an unforgettable escape.

title: WELLNESS ABU DHABI
content: At IMKAN, we craft soulful places that enrich lives. Our distinguished portfolio spans 26 projects across two continents, built on a profound commitment to innovative, community-centric development. As a wholly owned subsidiary of Abu Dhabi Capital Group, our unique proposition is powered by an in-depth research platform. This meticulously identifies the nuanced needs of diverse customer segments, from dynamic millennials to discerning high-net-worth individuals, ensuring every IMKAN development deeply resonates with its future residents.

title: YAS ISLAND
content: Located on the golden shores of Abu Dhabi—just 20 minutes from downtown and 50 minutes from Dubai—Yas Island offers a mix of leisure and entertainment. Explore award-winning theme parks like Ferrari World™ Yas Island, Abu Dhabi; Yas Waterworld Yas Island, Abu Dhabi; Warner Bros. World™ Yas Island, Abu Dhabi; and SeaWorld® Yas Island, Abu Dhabi, plus thrilling attractions like record-breaking CLYMB™ Yas Island, Abu Dhabi and Yas Marina Circuit, home to the FORMULA 1® ETIHAD AIRWAYS ABU DHABI GRAND PRIX™.

title: YAS PLAZA HOTELS
content: At the heart of Yas Island and mins away from UAE's biggest global attractions and theme parks. For business, leisure or quality family time, we have you covered. Choice of six world-class hotels - Radisson Blu, Crowne Plaza, Centro, Rotana, Park Inn by Radisson and Staybridge Suites located at the most exciting leisure and entertainment destination. With 1,760 Room keys, private beach access, 21 Award-winning restaurants and bars and 25 Meetings and events facilities, Yas Plaza Hotels offer a world of possibilities. Designated pet-friendly rooms and zones are present throughout the hotels.

title: ZAYED NATIONAL MUSEUM
content: Zayed National Museum is located at the heart of Saadiyat Cultural District Abu Dhabi. The national museum of the United Arab Emirates celebrates the rich history, culture and stories of its people from ancient times to modern day. It tells the story of the UAE’s Founding Father, the late Sheikh Zayed bin Sultan Al Nahyan, whose enduring example still guides the nation and its people today. Through its exhibitions, research and public programmes, Zayed National Museum explores the origins of the values that Sheikh Zayed embodied and their lasting influence on the country he founded.

title: DCT ABU DHABI
content: Discover Abu Dhabi, the capital of the United Arab Emirates, where rich cultural heritage meets cutting-edge innovation. An unparalleled destination offering spans iconic landmarks, stunning natural landscapes, award-winning attractions, exciting gastronomy, and world-class entertainment and business events. In a place where vibrant culture meets economic opportunity, we connect global partners with the region’s dynamic growth story. Partner with us and unlock unrivalled access, immersive experiences and meaningful collaborations in a thriving gateway to the Middle East and beyond.
